# Product Catalog Optimizer (Uplizd) - Automated service catalog maintenance and usage-based optimization

## Summary
The Product Catalog Optimizer is an intelligent Uplizd workflow designed to streamline inventory and service management by analyzing usage patterns and automating catalog updates. By leveraging the Composio Toolset to interface with Elorus and other business platforms, this solution ensures your service offerings remain aligned with real-time demand, reducing manual data entry and preventing catalog decay.

---

## Demo
![Product Catalog Optimizer workflow interface showing data ingestion from Elorus and AI-driven catalog optimization](image.png)
**Alt text (SEO-ready):** Product Catalog Optimizer Uplizd workflow for automated service catalog management, data synchronization, and usage-based inventory optimization using Composio integrations.
